name: MedMen Enterprises Inc.
summary: MedMen Enterprises Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates as a cannabis company in the United States. The company cultivates, produces, distributes, and retails recreational and medicinal cannabis under the [statemade], LuxLyte, and MedMen Red brand names. It operates 25 retail stores in 6 states. MedMen Enterprises Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Culver City, California.
